category.scope_note: Residential and commercial heat-pump HVAC products exported from China to South Korea, including KC safety, KEMCO energy efficiency, Top Runner, refrigerant, electrical-frequency, and related market-access gaps.

title.en: China-to-South Korea Air-source Heat Pump Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国空气源热泵进入韩国：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國空氣源熱泵進入韓國：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China air-source heat pump documentation against South Korea KC mandatory certification, KEMCO energy efficiency grade and Top Runner requirements, KEC / MOE refrigerant controls, KS C IEC safety standards, 60 Hz electrical supply constraints, and related EMC obligations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国空气源热泵文件与韩国KC强制认证、KEMCO能效等级和领跑者要求、KEC / 环境部制冷剂管制、KS C IEC安全标准、60 Hz供电限制及相关电磁兼容义务的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國空氣源熱泵文件與韓國KC強制認證、KEMCO能效等級和領跑者要求、KEC / 環境部制冷劑管制、KS C IEC安全標準、60 Hz供電限制及相關電磁相容義務的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, KC certificate, KEMCO energy-label approval, Top Runner calculation, refrigerant registration, customs determination, installation approval, EMC approval, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, distributors, and installers should verify current ECPSA scope, KC certification route, KEMCO product classification, KS C IEC editions, 60 Hz electrical compatibility, refrigerant obligations, and Korean-language labelling requirements with qualified professionals before shipment, sale, or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、KC证书、KEMCO能效标签批准、领跑者计算、制冷剂登记、海关裁定、安装批准、电磁兼容批准或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、经销商和安装方在出货、销售或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行ECPSA适用范围、KC认证路径、KEMCO产品分类、KS C IEC版本、60 Hz电气兼容性、制冷剂义务及韩文标签要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、KC證書、KEMCO能效標籤批准、領跑者計算、制冷劑登記、海關裁定、安裝批准、電磁相容批准或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、經銷商和安裝方在出貨、銷售或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行ECPSA適用範圍、KC認證路徑、KEMCO產品分類、KS C IEC版本、60 Hz電氣相容性、制冷劑義務及韓文標籤要求。

answer_first.en: KC certification under ECPSA, mandatory KEMCO energy-efficiency grading, Top Runner SCOP targets, Korean refrigerant controls under the Fluorine Management Act, and 60 Hz electrical compatibility are the major South Korea compliance gaps for Chinese air-source heat pumps. CCC is not recognized, and China 50 Hz compressor designs are not directly compatible with South Korea's 60 Hz grid.
answer_first.zh: ECPSA下的KC认证、KEMCO强制能效等级、领跑者SCOP目标、《氟管理法》下的韩国制冷剂管制，以及60 Hz电气兼容性，是中国空气源热泵进入韩国的主要合规差距。CCC不被认可，中国50 Hz压缩机设计不能直接适配韩国60 Hz电网。
answer_first.zht: ECPSA下的KC認證、KEMCO強制能效等級、領跑者SCOP目標、《氟管理法》下的韓國制冷劑管制，以及60 Hz電氣相容性，是中國空氣源熱泵進入韓國的主要合規差距。CCC不被認可，中國50 Hz壓縮機設計不能直接適配韓國60 Hz電網。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly or when KATS, KC, KEMCO, KEC, MOE, MOTIE, MSIT, or KCC changes product scope, labelling, safety, refrigerant, EMC, or energy-efficiency rules.
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must keep official-source URLs, publisher names, accessed date, and verified false until human review confirms the South Korea target-market text.
